---
description: "Review a component against AdvPort styling conventions"
argument-hint: "Describe the file or styling concern"
agent: "agent"
---

Review the target component against AdvPort styling rules.

Focus on:

- Tailwind vs SCSS module usage
- token and breakpoint reuse
- `cn()` usage
- theme-safety
- motion/transform conflicts
- whether the implementation matches the repo’s existing component patterns
